heroHeadline: Pahalgam Anniversary Approaches: Security on High Alert
heroSubtitle: With the Pahalgam attack first anniversary on April 22, Indian intel is on high alert as Pakistan pushes a false-flag narrative and security forces are deployed across J&K; Pakistan meanwhile continues its Iran-US mediation role as the diplomatic rivalry intensifies
footerNote: Data sourced from Indian MEA/MOD, Pakistan ISPR/MFA, UN Security Council, SIPRI, Crisis Group, HRW, Stimson Center
